name: okta_new_behavior_accessing_admin_console
description: A user accessed the Okta Admin Console with both a new device and a new IP (policy.evaluate_sign_on where the behavior heuristics flag New Device=POSITIVE and New IP=POSITIVE).

validation.notes: Previously not ported because debugContext.debugData.behaviors was not ingested. The behavior heuristics are now available. IMPORTANT: on policy.evaluate_sign_on events in this tenant, the flat okta.debug.behaviors field is empty/all-NEGATIVE; the live behavior signal is carried in okta.debug.logOnlySecurityData (JSON). This mirrors the Panther rule, which reads debugData.behaviors first and falls back to parsing logOnlySecurityData. The new_device_and_ip calculated field therefore checks BOTH forms: the Java-map form (New Device=POSITIVE) on okta.debug.behaviors and the JSON form ("New Device":"POSITIVE") on okta.debug.logOnlySecurityData. 'Okta Admin Console' appears at varying target indices (the requested authenticators occupy the low positions), so admin_console_target ORs CONTAINS across okta.target.0..4.displayName to reproduce the Panther deep_walk(target, displayName) test; CONTAINS "Okta Admin Console" excludes the unrelated 'Jamf Pro - Admin Console' app. Zero matches in 90d (no admin-console access with both a new device and a new IP) - dormant by design for a high-value account-takeover signal.

calculated_fields.name: admin_console_target
calculated_fields.expression: OR(CONTAINS($okta.target.0.displayName, "Okta Admin Console"), CONTAINS($okta.target.1.displayName, "Okta Admin Console"), CONTAINS($okta.target.2.displayName, "Okta Admin Console"), CONTAINS($okta.target.3.displayName, "Okta Admin Console"), CONTAINS($okta.target.4.displayName, "Okta Admin Console"))

calculated_fields.name: new_device_and_ip
calculated_fields.expression: OR(AND(CONTAINS($okta.debug.behaviors, "New Device=POSITIVE"), CONTAINS($okta.debug.behaviors, "New IP=POSITIVE")), AND(CONTAINS($okta.debug.logOnlySecurityData, "\"New Device\":\"POSITIVE\""), CONTAINS($okta.debug.logOnlySecurityData, "\"New IP\":\"POSITIVE\"")))
